text: The subject has been recently updated in 2025 with new wiring, GFA/CN, plumbing, and LVP flooring. It features two above grade bedrooms, one above grade bathroom, full unfinished basement, detached one-car garage and two-car garage.

The subject is a recently constructed ranch style zero lot line featuring one above grade bedroom, one-and-a-half above grade bathrooms, living room fireplace, finished basement family room, office, bedroom, and bathroom, attached two-car garage, and patio.
